notes: Active - takes the username from the last path segment of the current URL and calls https://www.smule.com/api/profile/?handle=<username>, then displays account_id, handle, display name, location, verified status, and installed apps in a draggable modal titled 'Smule Profile Details'. Uses Smule's own official account as a stable public profile.

checks.comment: At least one strong element with profile data content
Confirm Smule profile API was called
